tasks.description: Install CM6 dependencies, create Svelte action wrapper, validate CSP in WKWebView
steps: pnpm check passes with 0 errors after adding @codemirror/* packages
Minimal EditorView renders text with syntax highlighting in Tauri dev mode
Safari Web Inspector Console shows no CSP violation errors

tasks.description: Build side-by-side diff viewer using @codemirror/merge MergeView with collapsed unchanged regions and hunk accept/reject gutter buttons
steps: DiffViewer.svelte renders hardcoded original/modified text with highlighted changes
Unchanged regions > 8 lines are collapsed with expandable widget
Hunk accept/reject buttons appear in gutter and fire acceptChunk()/rejectChunk()
pnpm check passes with 0 errors

tasks.description: Build 3-pane merge editor: ours (left, read-only), result (center, editable), theirs (right, read-only) with Accept Ours/Theirs per-chunk buttons
steps: Three panes render with base/ours/theirs content
Center pane is editable; left and right are read-only
Accept Ours and Accept Theirs buttons update center editor content
All three editor instances are destroyed on unmount
pnpm check passes with 0 errors

tasks.description: Implement Rust file watcher module using notify + notify-debouncer-full with coarse repo-changed events and path filtering
steps: cargo check passes in src-tauri/
watch_repo command starts FSEvents watcher on provided path
File modifications emit repo-changed event within 500ms
Changes in .git/objects, node_modules/, target/ do NOT emit events
Changes to .git/index, .git/HEAD DO emit events
Calling watch_repo with a new path drops the old watcher

tasks.description: Build watcher monitor frontend with start/stop controls and event log showing timestamps and latency
steps: Start watching -> modify file externally -> event appears in log
Event log shows timestamp and latency (ms from file change to frontend receipt)
Stop watching -> modify file -> no new events
pnpm check passes with 0 errors

tasks.description: Build benchmark panel with diff render timing (1k/10k/50k lines), merge render timing, and watcher latency measurement
steps: Run Diff Benchmark generates timing results for 1k, 10k, 50k line files
10k-line diff result < 200ms
50k-line diff result < 1000ms
Watcher latency measurement shows < 500ms
pnpm check passes with 0 errors

tasks.description: Assemble tabbed /spike-d dashboard wiring all 4 subsystems (Diff, Merge, Watcher, Benchmarks) with CM6 cleanup on tab switch
steps: pnpm tauri dev -> navigate to /spike-d -> four tabs render
Each tab shows its respective component with functional interactions
Tab switching destroys previous CM6 instances (no memory leaks)
pnpm check passes with 0 errors
cargo check passes in src-tauri/
No CSP errors in Safari Web Inspector across all tabs

patterns: Design tokens: src/app.css has diff/merge color tokens
nonGoals: Syntax highlighting for all languages (2-3 only)
Real git2 diff integration (hardcoded sample data)
